title: Sourdough Starter Revival as Resurrection

dormant_eml0.description: Dehydrated starter: EML-0 dormant crystalline state
dormant_eml0.reason: Dry starter is EML-0: metabolically arrested, crystalline, discrete

water_reactivation.reason: Rehydration is EML-1: exponential yeast and bacteria reactivation cascade

feeding_eml2.description: Feeding schedule: EML-2 measurement of starter activity
feeding_eml2.reason: Starter maintenance is EML-2: float test, aroma measurement, ratio calibration

population_oscillation.reason: Sourdough ecology is EML-3: Lactobacillus-Saccharomyces oscillatory competition

resurrection_inverse.description: Revival is resurrection: inverse of death; 0->1->2->3 is reverse of ∞->3->2->1->0
resurrection_inverse.reason: Sourdough revival = inverse death traversal: proof that EML depth can reverse
